summary: Unit tests for OllamaClient covering chat completion, health checks, model listing, and error scenarios
side_effects: Creates temporary HTTP servers for test scenarios
Tests error handling and edge cases
notes: Comprehensive test coverage with 13 test cases: ChatCompletion success/errors, no auth header validation, model not found, connection refused, empty choices, invalid JSON, context timeout, health check (OK/Down), ListModels, HasModel (Found/NotFound). Uses httptest.NewServer for mocking Ollama API responses.
